title: Linux Process Memory Access via /proc
description: Detects reading process memory via /proc filesystem entries (maps, mem, environ). Used to extract credentials, secrets, or encryption keys from running processes.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*/proc/self/maps*' or msg like '*/proc/self/mem*' or msg like '*/proc/self/environ*' or msg like '*/proc/*/maps*' or msg like '*/proc/*/mem*' or msg like '*/proc/*/environ*')))
